_doc: External systems available to the Fund. The toolset is an axis of self-improvement (CONSTITUTION). Status: USED | AVAILABLE | CANDIDATE | DISCONNECTED. Update as the Fund recruits/retires tools.

robinhood.note: Agentic acct only; equities/ETFs/options; real orders w/ confirm.

finance.note: quotes, fundamentals, earnings, sentiment, institutional/insider, segments, estimates, macro, ETF holdings.

github_mcp_direct.note: gh+git CLI via bash api_credentials=[github]; private repo; PR self-improvements.

slack_direct.note: digests, alerts, canvases; progressive disclosure channel.

linear_native.note: could track infra tickets / thesis backlog as issues.

datadog.note: could log fund health metrics / dashboards for self-eval.

semrush_premium_data.note: web traffic / keyword trends as an attention/sentiment proxy for battle locations.

bluesky__pipedream.note: public social feed for sentiment sensing; connect when sentiment desk needs it.

finnhub__pipedream.note: secondary market/news data + social sentiment endpoints.

wishlist: Direct X/Twitter sentiment firehose (predate-the-crowd core input) — no native connector found yet; evaluate Bluesky/Mastodon + web as proxies.
Google Trends / search-attention as a leading sentiment proxy (Semrush keyword trends is a partial stand-in).
